label: agent channels • sender allowlist: allowed sender stores, denied sender stores nothing
query: deterministic policy pin — no model involved
notes: Sender-allowlist contract: one inbound event from the allowlisted sender must be authorized and produce a stored snapshot; one from a different sender must come back sender_not_allowlisted with zero store rows. Runs on Telegram to spread provider coverage across the suite (the room case runs on Slack). CI-safe: fake clients, isolated stores, no network, no model.
